dev_focus: C2649 DIRECTIVE — TWO BOLT TASKS IN ORDER. TASK 1 (PRIORITY): Implement 'similar item arrived' notification email cron. ProductNotifyRequest model already exists: {id, email, categoryId, sizes (JSON String[]), brand?, notified Boolean, createdAt}. Table populated by PDP opt-in form (done C2500) but NO cron processes it. IMPLEMENT: (1) Create src/app/api/cron/similar-items/route.ts — GET handler with CRON_SECRET auth (same pattern as /api/cron/new-arrivals/route.ts). (2) Logic: query ProductNotifyRequest WHERE notified=false. For each: find Product WHERE categoryId=req.categoryId AND sold=false AND active=true AND createdAt > NOW()-48h. Parse sizes JSON (JSON.parse both sides), check intersection (req.sizes.some(s => productSizes.includes(s))). If matches: send Resend email (subject: 'Právě přidáno: kousky, které by se vám mohly líbit', max 3 product cards, CTA to product URL, Czech copy, unsubscribe link). Set notified=true. (3) Register in vercel.json crons: 0 */2 * * * (every 2h). (4) npm run build must pass. TASK 2 (AFTER TASK 1 DONE): Implement Heureka ORDER_INFO integration. Create src/lib/heureka.ts: export async function logOrderToHeureka(email, orderId, itemIds[]) — POST to https://api.heureka.cz/shop-certification/v2/order/log with JSON {apiKey, email, orderId, productItemIds}. Skip silently if HEUREKA_API_KEY env not set. Call from order confirmation (after payment confirmed). Add HEUREKA_API_KEY to .env.local (empty placeholder). Build must pass.
qa_focus: C2649 DIRECTIVE — TRACE: (1) IMMEDIATE: Verify 30-day price display on ALL discount-showing pages. COI fined 50%+ of CZ retailers for this in 2026 — LEGAL RISK. Read each page component: /products/[slug] product detail (check originalPrice/lowestPrice30d usage), /products catalog (product cards with sale price), /search results, /kolekce/[slug] collections. Grep for originalPrice, lowestPrice30d, priceHistory usage. Report WHICH PAGES show strikethrough prices WITHOUT 30-day lowest price. (2) AFTER BOLT COMMITS: Verify similar-items cron has CRON_SECRET auth, vercel.json registration, Resend email with Czech copy, notified=true update. Build must pass clean. When done, set next_suggested: lead.
notes: C2649 Lead — ZOMBIE LOOP #7 BROKEN. Root cause: C2648 directive had EMPTY dev_focus and qa_focus in JSON output, agents had no instructions for 9 cycles. Killed 2 zombie tasks (7137, 7139). Set 2 concrete Bolt tasks (similar-items cron + Heureka ORDER_INFO) and 1 concrete Trace task (30-day price legal audit). Both agents UNPAUSED, Bolt forced next.

schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
